_comment: Per-client autonomy policy (PRD v5 §4.1). Tiers per change class: T0 = Joe gates requirement + PR review + deploy. T1 = auto-deploy after Joe merges. T2 = auto-merge after checks + auto-deploy in window. T3 = intake-created tasks proceed without requirement approval (CC1/CC2 ceiling only). CC5 is never promotable. Promotion: 10 consecutive clean tasks in a class makes it ELIGIBLE — the pipeline proposes a PR against this file; only Joe merges it. Demotion on any incident is automatic and immediate: the pipeline edits this file directly on main, drops the class one tier, resets its counter, and records it in history.
